zh.Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Finley於1363年出生在蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，她的父親Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire33歲，母親Marjorie MacDonald29歲。她於1395年與David Collins在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1410年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年48歲。

zh-hans.Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Finley于1363年出生在苏格兰培爾培斯时，她的父亲Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire33岁，母亲Marjorie MacDonald29岁。她于1395年与David Collins在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1410年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Finley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic personal name Fionnlagh (Old Irish Findlaech), from fionn ‘white, fair’ (see Finn ) + laoch ‘hero’, reinforced by an Old Norse name based on finn ‘Finn’ + leikr ‘fight’ or ‘hero’. The name is common in Ireland as well as Scotland.

English: habitational name from one or more lost, unidentified or altered placenames so named, such as Philleyholme, Dorset (recorded as Finelegh in 1280) derived from Old English fīna ‘wood-pecker’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Also a variant of Findlow, from Finlow Hill in Over Alderley, Cheshire (from Old English fīn ‘heap’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’ meaning ‘heaped mound’).

variants.name: Finn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Aidan, Bridie, Brigid, Declan, Dierdra, Eoin, Keelin, Maeve, Niall, Seamus.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Finn ‘descendant of Fionn’, a byname meaning ‘white’ or ‘fair-haired’; it is often found Anglicized as White . This name is borne by several families in the west of Ireland.

English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Fin(n) (Old Norse Finnr, Fin, originally ‘Finn’), used both as a byname and as a short form of various compound names with this first element.

variants.name: Finlayson
meanings: Scottish: from the Gaelic personal name Fionnlagh (see Finley 1 and Finlay ) + -son. This is the Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic MacFhionnlaigh.

variants.name: Finlay
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Finley   1.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Finley was born in 1363, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire, was 33 and her mother, Marjorie MacDonald, was 29. She married David Collins in 1395, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1410, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Finley est née en 1363, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Marjorie MacDonald, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé David Collins en 1395, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1410, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Finley 1363 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire 33 und ihre Mutter Marjorie MacDonald 29. Sie hat 1395 in London, Middlesex, England David Collins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1410 im Alter von 48 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Finley è nata il nel 1363 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Marjorie MacDonald, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato David Collins nel 1395, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1410, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Aberdeenshire, Scotland: イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Finleyが1363年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshireは33歳，母Marjorie MacDonaldは29歳であった。1395年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでDavid Collinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1410年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Finley(이)가 1363년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjorie MacDonald(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1395년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 David Collins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1410년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Aberdeenshire, Scotland: Coontie o Aiberdeen, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Finley nasceu em 1363, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Marjorie MacDonald, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com David Collins em 1395, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1410, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Finley родилась в 1363 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Marjorie MacDonald, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Collins в 1395 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1410 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Finley nació en 1363, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Marjorie MacDonald, tenía 29 años. Se casó con David Collins en 1395, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1410, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
